title: Xtra Crispy Korean Squid Stir-fry
description: Jammy, crispy Korean Jeolla dish featuring baby squid, quick-fix, gluten-free-friendly, served on a Talavera plate.

ingredients.name: Baby squid, cleaned and cut into 1-inch pieces

instructions: Heat 1 tbsp vegetable oil in a hot skillet over high heat until it starts to smoke slightly.
Add the baby squid pieces, searing them for 2 minutes per side until they turn opaque and develop a slight char.
Reduce heat to medium and add minced garlic and ginger, cooking until fragrant for about 30 seconds.
Stir in the soy sauce, gochujang, and sweet rice syrup, whisking to combine into a sticky glaze.
Cook, stirring constantly, until the sauce thickens and coats the squid, about 3 minutes.
Drizzle sesame oil over the stir-fry, tossing to coat and add a nutty aroma.
Sprinkle sliced scallions, a splash of rice vinegar, and toasted sesame seeds, then remove from heat.
Transfer the dish onto a Talavera plate, allowing the surface to caramelize slightly for 1 minute.
Serve immediately, optionally with steamed rice or cauliflower rice for a gluten-free option.
Enjoy the jammy, crispy Korean squid stir-fry!
